game.PROMO_TOS_AVAILABILITY: This promotion is available for a limited time on selected participating Blackjack tables.
game.PROMO_TOS_BC_BET_MIN: During the promotional period, players may be randomly dealt Bonus Cards in any Blackjack round upon placing a qualifying bet with the minimum required value of **{minBet}**.

game.PROMO_TOS_BC_CAP_ENFORCED: If you received the maximum number of Bonus Cards, any additional cards you may be dealt will be voided.
game.PROMO_TOS_BC_CURRENCY: If a player is dealt a Bonus Card in a different currency than the player’s local currency, the amount on the card will be converted accordingly and credited to their balance.
game.PROMO_TOS_BC_DEALER: Only players are eligible to receive Bonus Cards. Any Bonus Cards dealt to the dealer are not valid and will be reintroduced into the game.
game.PROMO_TOS_BC_PRIZE: Each Bonus Card has a designated prize value, which will be credited to the player's wallet:
game.PROMO_TOS_BC_REWARD_ASSURANCE: If you are dealt a Bonus Card, the corresponding prize will be awarded regardless of the game outcome.
game.PROMO_TOS_BC_TABLES: Bonus Cards can be won across all participating tables.
game.PROMO_TOS_BET_BEHIND: Bets placed behind other players are not eligible.
game.PROMO_TOS_BET_QUALIFICATION: Only real money bets are eligible.
game.PROMO_TOS_BJ_SEAT_LIMIT: There may be a maximum limit of seats a player can take at a Blackjack table.
game.PROMO_TOS_PARTICIPATION: Participation in the promotion implies acceptance of these Terms & Conditions.
game.PROMO_TOS_PLAYER_ELIGIBILITY: Only the seated player who places a qualifying bet is eligible to receive a Bonus Card.
game.PROMO_TOS_SWITCH_TABLES: You may switch between any participating Blackjack tables during the promotion.
